'''shazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:palatially|palatially]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-z-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:palatially|palatially]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:shazate|shazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shazatesher|shazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazatesherĂ«m|shazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shazatero|shazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazateshĂ«|shazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazateshĂ«m|shazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishazatero|gokishazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazateshĂ«|gokishazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazateshĂ«m|gokishazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshazankerom|goshazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazankeshĂ«|goshazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazankeshĂ«m|goshazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshazankeya|goshazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shazaterom|shazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazatemu|shazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shazateya|shazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishazaterom|gokishazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazatemu|gokishazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishazateya|gokishazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:shazazate|shazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shazazatesher|shazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazazatesherĂ«m|shazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shazazatero|shazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazazateshĂ«|shazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazazateshĂ«m|shazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishazazatero|gokishazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazazateshĂ«|gokishazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazazateshĂ«m|gokishazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshazazankerom|goshazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazazankeshĂ«|goshazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazazankeshĂ«m|goshazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshazazankeya|goshazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shazazaterom|shazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazazatemu|shazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shazazateya|shazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishazazaterom|gokishazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazazatemu|gokishazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishazazateya|gokishazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:shĂŠzĂŠte|shĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shĂŠzĂŠtesher|shĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|shĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠzĂŠtero|shĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|shĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|shĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠzĂŠtero|gokishĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokishĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokishĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshĂŠzĂŠnkerom|goshĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|goshĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goshĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshĂŠzĂŠnkeya|goshĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠzĂŠterom|shĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠzĂŠtemu|shĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shĂŠzĂŠteya|shĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠzĂŠterom|gokishĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokishĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishĂŠzĂŠteya|gokishĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:shafzafte|shafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shafzaftesher|shafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafzaftesherĂ«m|shafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafzaftero|shafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafzafteshĂ«|shafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafzafteshĂ«m|shafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafzaftero|gokishafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafzafteshĂ«|gokishafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafzafteshĂ«m|gokishafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshafzafnkerom|goshafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafzafnkeshĂ«|goshafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafzafnkeshĂ«m|goshafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshafzafnkeya|goshafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafzafterom|shafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafzaftemu|shafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shafzafteya|shafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafzafterom|gokishafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafzaftemu|gokishafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishafzafteya|gokishafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
